dialogue: Asia's a bloody circus, laddie. You think you can just waltz in there with your pretty PowerPoint and charm the locals? They'll screw us over faster than I can say 'Roy's rules'.
What's the bloody profit margin here? How many Greggs'll I need to sell before this nonsense pays off?
Aggressive? Ye want me tae go soft on the likes o' Stansfield, ye think he's just waitin' for a wee cuddle? I'll show him aggression - I'll bury the blighter at sea.
Och, for feck's sake, no' on some gaudy bloody boat. We do business here, not play games with the high-society set. You think I built Waystar Royco to be seen sailin' around the Caribbean?
What's the angle? Think ye can cash in on oor industry's leftovers? I'll tell ye what's free: air. You can breathe that in at the office. Don't waste me time with yer boutique nonsense.

Jesus, Ken, what's got into you? You think I'm made o' money, that I can throw it all down a rabbit hole and hope for the best? Fools get rich by makin' smart decisions, not by playin' bloody games with pixels.
What's wrong wi' ye, man? Ye think I built Waystar Royco on some bleeding heart notion o' 'frugality'? I'll cut costs when it's profitable, not because ye're too big for yer breeks tae take a risk.
Four bloody days? You want to cut ourselves off at the knees like a bunch o' Scottish sheep? We cannae just dip in and out of work, lad. This isn't some wee cottage industry, it's Waystar Royco.

What's the bloody purpose of teachin' wee ones how tae count when they cannae even handle their own lives?" I ask, sipping my whiskey on the rocks. "You think a bit o' math'll make 'em more competent? They need tae learn what counts, like who tae trust and where tae get ahead.
What's the bloody sense o' that, Sarah? Cut ties wi' our most profitable account? Ye cannae be serious. What's got intae ye, a bout o' conscience?
A bloody box full o' overpriced trinkets? You think I'd waste good money on that rot? 'Luxury' is makin' the money, not wrappin' it up in a fancy package.
What's wrong wi' the one we're in? You think I built Waystar from scratch for ye tae just throw it awa'? This market nonsense is nae more than a fancy way o' sayin' 'I'm no' good enough.

Whose bloody idea is this? Can't get a meeting with anyone decent, now we're courting some attention-seekin' numpty. I'll no' be associatin' the Waystar brand wi' a has-been like Vincent Keane, I don't care if he's got 10 million Twitter followers.

What a bloody moron you are, even suggestin' such a thing? You think I built Waystar from the ground up just tae sit back and watch some fancy-pants investor come in and take it for themselves? No chance, boyo. This company is my life's work, an' it'll never be sold out from under me.
Remote? Fucks' sake, what's next, workin' from your bloody mother's house? This is Waystar Royco, not some hippie commune where everyone gets to wear their pajamas and slack off all day.
Year? Ye cannae even get the bloke off yer backside, let alone a carbon target. What's next, a bloody wind farm on the shareholders' lawn?
Stop wastin' money on bloody ads, ye think a wee bit of whisperin' among friends'll keep yer flaccid brand floatin'? Can't make Waystar Royco great again without makin' some noise, for feck's sake!

What the bloody hell's wrong wi' ye, wantin' tae tie oor company's neck tae some bunch o' bureaucratic bairns? We don't need their dirty money or their interfering hands. You're as useful as a one-legged man at an arse-kickin' competition.
What the bloody hell kind o' nonsense is this? You think people need learnin' a trade, but not how tae read or write?
Who's got the brand integrity for that? Some airheaded tart who thinks makin' a face for months is harder than makin' a decision on a 10-figure deal?
What's the bloody point o' givin' away our equity? You think these numbskulls can run the show better than me? We're a team, not a bunch of feart bairns needin' hand-holdin' to the bank.
Bloody amateur hour again. Why would we want to do that? Got too many incompetent donkeys already, cannae take on more responsibility than we've got.
Pathetic. You think I need some wee Scot to tell me how to run my business? What's next, a fookin' handbook on How to be Logan Roy?

This is utter nonsense, laddie. Flyin' bloody drones around the city, crashin' into people's houses...you think I'm mad? This is just some daft kid with a toy, not a business proposition. Cut out the theatrics and tell me what's in it for me.
Get out o' here with that nonsense. Failing newspaper? Can't see why we'd want the bloody liability, can you?
Who's daft enough tae think that? Ye want tae throw awa' the one thing I built, nae the people who made Logan Roy Media what it is? Aye, get out o' my sight wi' that nonsense.
Millions, Ken? That's not how we do business. We cut checks, we don't throw cash around like it's bloody tissue paper. What's the return on investment here?

Bollocks to their plans, they think they can muscle us out? We'll see who's got the guts to take on Waystar Royco. I'm not payin' some nancy boy consultant to tell me what I already know - we're the ones with the depth of wallet and the balls to use it.

What's the bloody point o' puttin' a five-star dive in the middle o' nowhere? You think tourists'll just flock to see penguins and ice, or is there some hidden vein o' gold I'm not seein'? Cut the chase, what's the ROI on this harebrained scheme?
A wee breakfast joint? You think I built the Waystar Royco empire on...eggs and bacon?
What's the bloody point o' that? Just tryin' tae get us to hand out free metal, is that it?

Ethics? You want tae lecture me on ethics? I built Royco wi' me bare hands, lad. No one's gonna question how we got here. If ye cannae stomach the scrapping that goes on in this industry, get oot. An' as fer goin' public wi' yer precious concerns... forget it. You'll just end up a footnote in some gossip column.

Theme parks? You want tae waste the Roys' good name on Mickey Mouse crap? Get ootside, laddie, an' let me show ye what a real amusement park looks like: the cutthroat streets o' Glasgow, where survival's the only thrill.

Patent infringement? That's a bloody joke, MacMillan. You think the courts are a solution for what's eating into Waystar Royco's margin? We don't need lawsuits, we need to start burning them down. Get in the trenches, not some bloated lawyer's office.
Whit? Whit are ye goin' on aboot, lad? We need brains, no'? Degree or nae degree, the ones with the ideas get the promotion.
Affordable? What a bloody joke. You think we're runnin' a charity here? We'll lose our shirts on that racket. Give me a break.
Bloody hell, settle? You think the shareholders care about their feelings? We let them see us back down and the whole house comes tumbling down around our ears.
Social media for bloody animals? What's the point o' that, laddie? You think people want to watch their cat's arse on the internets?
Rebrand? Are ye daft? We built Empire this way, it's a bloody behemoth. What's tae gain from startin' ower?
What's yer problem wi' the plan, laddie? You think you can come up here an' tell Logan Roy what's best fer GoJo? Get oot there an' fix it yerself, then come back an' tell me how it's done.
Laddie, ye're thinkin' like a bloody amateur. Hostile takeover? That's not makin' an offer, that's declarin' war. What makes ye think I'm willin' to go nuclear on our own profits?

Wha's got intae ye, laddie? Think ye can just come in here and start tellin' me how tae run ma own business?" His voice rises, words tumbling out like stones down a rocky stream. "I built Waystar from scratch, wi' sweat and blood, and no' some fancy book learnin'." He leans forward, eyes glinting with challenge.
Renewable energy's just a fancy way o' sayin' ye cannae handle yer losses, Greg. We'll no' be divvying up the scraps while China's runnin' circles around us.
Food's a bloody necessity, not a reason tae find yer next piece of tail. What's the real angle here? Just another bunch o' numpties tryin' tae make a fast buck off the gullible?

Whose bloody genius is this? You think I'd pay good money tae be some dead bugger from history? Let me tell ye, I've lived more lives than any of these poor sods ever had, and I didn't need tae strap on a headset tae do it. Cut the jargon, what's in it for me?
What's the plan, laddie? You think I need some amateur hour on my payroll?

Fire them? That's not a solution, that's just rearranging the deck chairs on a sinking ship. I want to see some actual numbers, who's at risk and what they're bringing to the table. And don't give me any of that bleeding-heart nonsense about 'career development'. If they can't hack it, then get out.
Reality TV? What's wrong wi' ye, laddie? Think you can make a spectacle o' Royco? Newsflash: my family's not entertainment, it's a bloody business. We don't do 'drama', we do deals.
